tasks.subject: Task 0: Metric enum (enum-properties) + dep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Provider-agnostic Metric enum (enum-properties): unit, has_aqi, symmetric lookup; add enum-properties dep.

**Files:** pyproject.toml, src/smoke_sense/data.py, tests/test_metric.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_metric.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml", "src/smoke_sense/data.py", "tests/test_metric.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_metric.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Metric unit/has_aqi", "symmetric lookup", "AQI_METRICS == has_aqi members"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema metric/no-unit/no-latlon + zstd; aqi on Metric
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Switch schema to metric (drop unit/lat-lon), zstd; rekey aqi on Metric; update producers/fixtures (incl bin/fetch.py) so suite green.

**Files:** data.py, aqi.py, store.py, summary.py, providers/aqs.py, providers/purpleair.py, fetcher.py, bin/fetch.py, tests/

**Verify:** `uv run pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/data.py", "src/smoke_sense/aqi.py", "src/smoke_sense/store.py", "src/smoke_sense/summary.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/aqs.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py", "src/smoke_sense/fetcher.py", "src/smoke_sense/bin/fetch.py", "tests/"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["COLUMNS metric/no-unit/no-latlon", "write_parquet zstd", "suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Station-metadata table (store.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Split lat/lon into {fips}/stations.parquet on write; day files no coords.

**Files:** store.py, tests/test_store.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_store.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/store.py", "tests/test_store.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_store.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["stations.parquet deduped", "day files no lat/lon", "read_range/coverage unaffected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: AQS all-metrics + 5-param batching + unit conversion
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AQS criteria+met metrics; batch <=5/request; unit conversion; aqi only AQI metrics. Verify AQS met codes/units.

**Files:** providers/base.py, providers/aqs.py, tests/test_providers_aqs.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_providers_aqs.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/providers/base.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/aqs.py", "tests/test_providers_aqs.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_providers_aqs.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["supported_metrics criteria+met", "fetch batches <=5", "_parse codes->Metric + unit convert + aqi gating"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: PurpleAir all-metrics + melt + conversion + corrected PM2.5
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PurpleAir all fields; melt wide->long; convert units; corrected PM2.5 + raw cf_1/atm variants; aqi only AQI metrics.

**Files:** providers/purpleair.py, tests/test_providers_purpleair.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_providers_purpleair.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py", "tests/test_providers_purpleair.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_providers_purpleair.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["supported_metrics PM variants+met", "melt+convert; corrected+raw PM2.5", "aqi only AQI metrics"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: CLI default-all-metrics + migration script
tasks.description:
**Goal:** --metric (default all) via fetcher; migration script converts existing day files to new schema + stations.parquet.

**Files:** fetcher.py, bin/fetch.py, tests/test_fetch_cli.py; Create scripts/migrate_store.py, tests/test_migrate_store.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_fetch_cli.py tests/test_migrate_store.py -v` then `uv run pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/fetcher.py", "src/smoke_sense/bin/fetch.py", "tests/test_fetch_cli.py", "scripts/migrate_store.py", "tests/test_migrate_store.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_fetch_cli.py tests/test_migrate_store.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default all metrics; --metric filters", "fetcher threads metrics", "migrate converts old->new + stations"]}
```
